sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_tax_rates
			        WHERE tax_rate_country = %s AND tax_rate_state = %s AND tax_rate_name LIKE %s
			        ",
					'US',
					'CA',
					'% Tax'
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT location_code FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_tax_rate_locations WHERE location_type='postcode' AND tax_rate_id = %d ORDER BY location_code", $rate->tax_rate_id ) )

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT location_code FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_tax_rate_locations WHERE location_type='city' AND tax_rate_id = %d ORDER BY location_code", $rate->tax_rate_id ) )

$wpdb->get_results(
				"SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_shipping_zone_methods " .
				"LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_shipping_zones " .
				"ON {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_shipping_zone_methods.zone_id = {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_shipping_zones.zone_id " .
				"WHERE method_id IN ({$escaped_list}) " .
				'ORDER BY zone_order, instance_id;'
			)
$wpdb->get_var( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM $wpdb->usermeta WHERE meta_key = '{$wpdb->prefix}capabilities' LIMIT 2) AS someusers" )

$wpdb->get_var(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					'SELECT EXISTS (
						SELECT 1
						FROM %i
						WHERE meta_key = %s
						LIMIT 1
					)',
					$meta_table_to_check,
					'wc_connect_labels'
				)
			)

printf( esc_html__( 'Successfully deleted %1$d transients from the database.', 'woocommerce-services' ), intval( $deleted_count ) )

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT location_code FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_tax_rate_locations WHERE location_type='postcode' AND tax_rate_id = %d ORDER BY location_code", $rate->tax_rate_id ) )

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT location_code FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_tax_rate_locations WHERE location_type='city' AND tax_rate_id = %d ORDER BY location_code", $rate->tax_rate_id ) )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to download this file.', 'woocommerce-services' ), '', array( 'response' => 403 ) )

$wpdb->get_results(
				"SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_shipping_zone_methods " .
				"LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_shipping_zones " .
				"ON {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_shipping_zone_methods.zone_id = {$wpdb->prefix}woocommerce_shipping_zones.zone_id " .
				"WHERE method_id IN ({$escaped_list}) " .
				'ORDER BY zone_order, instance_id;'
			)

$wpdb->query(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"INSERT IGNORE INTO $wpdb->options ( option_name, option_value, autoload ) VALUES ( %s, %s, %s )",
					$name,
					$serialized_value,
					$autoload_value
				)
			)

wp_remote_get(
			$pixel,
			array(
				'blocking'    => true, // The default, but being explicit here :).
				'timeout'     => 1,
				'redirection' => 2,
				'httpversion' => '1.1',
				'user-agent'  => self::get_user_agent(),
			)
		)
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You must connect your Jetpack plugin to WordPress.com to use this feature.', 'jetpack-connection' ) )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You must connect your Jetpack plugin to WordPress.com to use this feature.', 'jetpack-connection' ) )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'The authorization process expired. Please go back and try again.', 'jetpack-connection' ) )
$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare( "DELETE FROM `{$wpdb->options}` WHERE `option_id` IN ( {$ids_fill} ) AND option_name LIKE %s", $args ) )

call_user_func_array(
			$this->request_as_blog,
			array(
				add_query_arg(
					array( 'coupon_code' => $coupon['coupon_code'] ),
					sprintf(
						'/sites/%d/jetpack-partner/coupon/v1/site/coupon',
						$blog_id
					)
				),
				2,
				array( 'method' => 'GET' ),
				null,
				'wpcom',
			)
		)

wp_send_json_error(
				__( 'You aren’t authorized to do that.', 'jetpack-connection' ),
				403,
				JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES
			)

wp_send_json_error(
				__( 'No valid event name or type.', 'jetpack-connection' ),
				403,
				JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES
			)

wp_safe_redirect(
					add_query_arg(
						array(
							'redirect_to'               => $redirect_to,
							'request_redirect_to'       => $_request_redirect_to,
							'calypso_env'               => ( new Host() )->get_calypso_env(),
							'jetpack-sso-auth-redirect' => '1',
						),
						admin_url()
					)
				)
$wpdb->get_var( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM $wpdb->usermeta WHERE meta_key = '{$wpdb->prefix}capabilities' LIMIT 2) AS someusers" )
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)

$wpdb->get_var(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					'SELECT EXISTS (
						SELECT 1
						FROM %i
						WHERE meta_key = %s
						LIMIT 1
					)',
					$meta_table_to_check,
					'wc_connect_labels'
				)
			)
printf( esc_html__( 'Section not loading? Visit the status page for troubleshooting steps.', 'woocommerce-services' ), esc_url( $debug_page_uri ) )
